# opensession

[![한국어](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-한국어-blue)](README.ko.md)
[![CI](https://github.com/hwisu/opensession/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/hwisu/opensession/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![crates.io](https://img.shields.io/crates/v/opensession.svg)](https://crates.io/crates/opensession)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue.svg)](LICENSE)

OpenSession is a local-first workflow for recording, registering, sharing, and inspecting AI session traces.

Website: [opensession.io](https://opensession.io)  
Docs: [opensession.io/docs](https://opensession.io/docs)

## DX Reset v1

The CLI/Web/API contract is now centered on three actions:

- `register`: store canonical HAIL JSONL locally (no network side effects)
- `share`: produce a shareable output from a Source URI
- `handoff`: build immutable artifacts and manage artifact aliases

Legacy command trees and routes were removed:

- `opensession publish ...` removed
- `opensession session handoff ...` removed
- Legacy shortcut routes (`/git`, `/gh/*`, `/resolve/*`) are no longer served and return 404 by design
- `/api/ingest/preview` removed in favor of `/api/parse/preview`

## URI Model

- `os://src/local/<sha256>`
- `os://src/gh/<owner>/<repo>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
- `os://src/gl/<project_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
- `os://src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
- `os://artifact/<sha256>`

Notes:

- `ref_enc` is RFC3986 percent-encoding.
- `project_b64` / `remote_b64` are base64url without padding.

## Install

```bash
cargo install opensession
```

`opensession` is the user-facing CLI. Session auto-capture additionally requires the daemon process to be running.

## Install-and-Forget Setup

```bash
# 1) Diagnose local setup (flutter doctor style)
opensession doctor

# 2) Apply recommended setup values (hooks/shims/fanout defaults)
opensession doctor --fix

# 3) Optional: pin fanout storage mode while fixing
opensession doctor --fix --fanout-mode hidden_ref
```

`doctor` reuses the existing setup pipeline under the hood (`opensession setup` / `opensession setup --check`).
On first apply, OpenSession asks which fanout storage mode to use (`hidden_ref` or `git_notes`) and stores the choice in local git config (`.git/config`) as `opensession.fanout-mode`.

Start daemon (required for automatic session capture):

```bash
# if opensession-daemon binary is available
opensession-daemon run

# from source checkout
cargo run -p opensession-daemon -- run
```

Without daemon, parse/register/share still work manually, but background auto-capture is not active.

## Quick Start

```bash
# Parse agent-native log -> canonical HAIL JSONL
opensession parse --profile codex ./raw-session.jsonl > ./session.hail.jsonl

# Register to local object store (repo-scoped by default)
opensession register ./session.hail.jsonl
# -> os://src/local/<sha256>

# Read it back
opensession cat os://src/local/<sha256>

# Inspect summary metadata
opensession inspect os://src/local/<sha256>
```

## Share

```bash
# Convert local URI -> git shareable source URI
opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin

# Optional network mutation
opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin --push

# Install/update OpenSession pre-push hook (best-effort fanout)
opensession doctor
opensession doctor --fix
# Optional: fail push when fanout is unavailable/fails
OPENSESSION_STRICT=1 git push

# Web URL generation from remote-resolvable URI
opensession config init --base-url https://opensession.io
opensession share os://src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...> --web
```

`share --web` requires explicit `.opensession/config.toml`.
Git-native writes now target hidden ledger refs (`refs/opensession/branches/<branch_b64url>`); legacy fixed ref writes are removed.
`opensession doctor --fix` installs the shim at `~/.local/share/opensession/bin/opensession` for hook stability.

## Handoff

```bash
# Build immutable artifact
opensession handoff build --from os://src/local/<sha256> --pin latest
# -> os://artifact/<sha256>

# Read artifact payload in desired representation
opensession handoff artifacts get os://artifact/<sha256> --format canonical --encode jsonl

# Verify hash + payload validity
opensession handoff artifacts verify os://artifact/<sha256>

# Alias management
opensession handoff artifacts pin latest os://artifact/<sha256>
opensession handoff artifacts unpin latest

# Removal policy: only unpinned artifacts
opensession handoff artifacts rm os://artifact/<sha256>
```

## Canonical Web Routes

- `/src/gh/<owner>/<repo>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
- `/src/gl/<project_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
- `/src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`

## API Surface (v1)

- `GET /api/health`
- `GET /api/capabilities`
- `POST /api/parse/preview`
- `GET /api/sessions`
- `GET /api/sessions/{id}`
- `GET /api/sessions/{id}/raw`
- `DELETE /api/admin/sessions/{id}` (requires `X-OpenSession-Admin-Key`)

## Local Development

```bash
# Required validation gates
./.githooks/pre-commit
./.githooks/pre-push
```

```bash
# Runtime web validation
npx wrangler dev --ip 127.0.0.1 --port 8788 --persist-to .wrangler/state
BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8788 npx playwright test e2e/git-share.spec.ts --config playwright.config.ts
```

# opensession

[![English](https://img.shields.io/badge/lang-English-blue)](README.md)
[![CI](https://github.com/hwisu/opensession/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/hwisu/opensession/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![crates.io](https://img.shields.io/crates/v/opensession.svg)](https://crates.io/crates/opensession)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue.svg)](LICENSE)

OpenSession은 AI 세션 로그를 로컬 우선(local-first)으로 기록/등록/공유/검토하는 워크플로입니다.

웹: [opensession.io](https://opensession.io)  
문서: [opensession.io/docs](https://opensession.io/docs)

## DX 리셋 v1

CLI/Web/API 계약은 3가지 동작으로 정리되었습니다.

- `register`: canonical HAIL JSONL을 로컬 저장소에 등록 (네트워크 부작용 없음)
- `share`: Source URI를 공유 가능한 출력으로 변환
- `handoff`: 불변(immutable) 아티팩트를 생성하고 alias를 관리

레거시 표면은 제거되었습니다.

- `opensession publish ...` 제거
- `opensession session handoff ...` 제거
- 레거시 단축 라우트(`/git`, `/gh/*`, `/resolve/*`)는 더 이상 제공되지 않으며 의도적으로 404를 반환
- `/api/ingest/preview` 제거 (`/api/parse/preview` 사용)

## URI 모델

- `os://src/local/<sha256>`
- `os://src/gh/<owner>/<repo>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
- `os://src/gl/<project_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
- `os://src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
- `os://artifact/<sha256>`

인코딩 규칙:

- `ref_enc`: RFC3986 percent-encoding
- `project_b64`, `remote_b64`: base64url(no padding)

## 설치

```bash
cargo install opensession
```

사용자 표면은 `opensession` CLI입니다. 자동 세션 수집(auto-capture)을 쓰려면 daemon 프로세스가 추가로 실행 중이어야 합니다.

## Install-and-Forget 설정

```bash
# 1) 로컬 설정 진단 (flutter doctor 스타일)
opensession doctor

# 2) 권장 설치값 자동 적용 (hooks/shims/fanout defaults)
opensession doctor --fix

# 3) 선택: fanout 모드를 명시적으로 지정
opensession doctor --fix --fanout-mode hidden_ref
```

`doctor`는 내부적으로 기존 setup 파이프라인(`opensession setup` / `opensession setup --check`)을 재사용합니다.
첫 적용 시 fanout 저장 모드(`hidden_ref` 또는 `git_notes`)를 선택하며, 선택값은 로컬 git 설정(`.git/config`)의 `opensession.fanout-mode`에 저장됩니다.

자동 수집을 위한 daemon 실행:

```bash
# opensession-daemon 바이너리가 있는 경우
opensession-daemon run

# 소스 체크아웃에서 실행하는 경우
cargo run -p opensession-daemon -- run
```

daemon이 없으면 parse/register/share는 수동으로 사용할 수 있지만 백그라운드 자동 수집은 동작하지 않습니다.

## 빠른 시작

```bash
# agent-native 로그 -> canonical HAIL JSONL
opensession parse --profile codex ./raw-session.jsonl > ./session.hail.jsonl

# 로컬 object store 등록
opensession register ./session.hail.jsonl
# -> os://src/local/<sha256>

# 원본 바이트 확인
opensession cat os://src/local/<sha256>

# 요약 메타데이터 확인
opensession inspect os://src/local/<sha256>
```

## 공유(share)

```bash
# local URI -> git 공유 가능 Source URI
opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin

# 선택적 네트워크 변경
opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin --push

# remote-resolvable URI -> 웹 URL
opensession config init --base-url https://opensession.io
opensession share os://src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...> --web
```

`share --web`는 `.opensession/config.toml`이 반드시 필요합니다.

## handoff

```bash
# 불변 artifact 생성
opensession handoff build --from os://src/local/<sha256> --pin latest
# -> os://artifact/<sha256>

# 출력 표현 선택
opensession handoff artifacts get os://artifact/<sha256> --format canonical --encode jsonl

# 해시/내용 검증
opensession handoff artifacts verify os://artifact/<sha256>

# alias 관리
opensession handoff artifacts pin latest os://artifact/<sha256>
opensession handoff artifacts unpin latest

# 삭제 정책: unpinned만 삭제 가능
opensession handoff artifacts rm os://artifact/<sha256>
```

## Canonical 웹 라우트

- `/src/gh/<owner>/<repo>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
- `/src/gl/<project_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
- `/src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`

- `GET /api/capabilities`
- `POST /api/parse/preview`
- `GET /api/sessions`

```

#!/bin/sh
set -e

run_cargo_stable() {
    if command -v rustup >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        RUSTC_BIN=$(rustup which --toolchain stable rustc 2>/dev/null || true)
        CARGO_BIN=$(rustup which --toolchain stable cargo 2>/dev/null || true)
        if [ -n "$RUSTC_BIN" ] && [ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]; then
            TOOLCHAIN_BIN=$(dirname "$RUSTC_BIN")
            PATH="$TOOLCHAIN_BIN:$PATH" RUSTC="$RUSTC_BIN" "$CARGO_BIN" "$@"
            return
        fi
    fi

    cargo "$@"
}

run_with_stable_rustc() {
    if command -v rustup >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        RUSTC_BIN=$(rustup which --toolchain stable rustc 2>/dev/null || true)
        if [ -n "$RUSTC_BIN" ]; then
            TOOLCHAIN_BIN=$(dirname "$RUSTC_BIN")
            PATH="$TOOLCHAIN_BIN:$PATH" RUSTC="$RUSTC_BIN" "$@"
            return
        fi
    fi

    "$@"
}

# Frontend
cd packages/ui && npm install && cd ../..
cd web && npm install && npm run build && cd ..

# Worker (skip in CI where it's built separately with cache)
if [ -z "$SKIP_WORKER_BUILD" ]; then
    if command -v rustup >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown --toolchain stable >/dev/null
    fi

    if ! command -v worker-build >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        run_cargo_stable install -q worker-build --locked
    fi

    cd crates/worker
    run_with_stable_rustc worker-build --release
    cd ../..

    # worker-build outputs to crates/worker/build; wrangler expects build/ at root
    rm -rf build
    cp -R crates/worker/build ./build
fi

name: Deploy Worker

on:
  workflow_run:
    workflows: ["CI"]
    types: [completed]
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Cloudflare Workers
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'success' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          targets: wasm32-unknown-unknown

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
        with:
          shared-key: wasm-check
          save-if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: npm
          cache-dependency-path: |
            web/package-lock.json
            packages/ui/package-lock.json

      - uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.cargo/bin/worker-build
          key: worker-build-${{ runner.os }}

      - name: Install worker-build
        run: command -v worker-build || cargo install worker-build --locked

      - name: Apply D1 migrations
        run: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply opensession-io --remote
        env:
          CLOUDFLARE_API_[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL] secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}

      - name: Deploy
        run: npx wrangler deploy
        env:
          CLOUDFLARE_API_[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL] secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}

---
name: cloudflare-deploy
description: Deploy applications and infrastructure to Cloudflare using Workers, Pages, and related platform services. Use when the user asks to deploy, host, publish, or set up a project on Cloudflare.
---

# Cloudflare Deploy

Consolidated skill for building on the Cloudflare platform. Use decision trees below to find the right product, then load detailed references.

## Prerequisites

- When sandboxing blocks the deployment network calls, rerun with `sandbox_permissions=require_escalated`.
- The deployment might take a few minutes. Use appropriate timeout values.

## Authentication (Required Before Deploy)

Verify auth before `wrangler deploy`, `wrangler pages deploy`, or `npm run deploy`:

```bash
npx wrangler whoami    # Shows account if authenticated
```

Not authenticated? → `references/wrangler/auth.md`
- Interactive/local: `wrangler login` (one-time OAuth)
- CI/CD: Set `CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN` env var

## Quick Decision Trees

### "I need to run code"

```
Need to run code?
├─ Serverless functions at the edge → workers/
├─ Full-stack web app with Git deploys → pages/
├─ Stateful coordination/real-time → durable-objects/
├─ Long-running multi-step jobs → workflows/
├─ Run containers → containers/
├─ Multi-tenant (customers deploy code) → workers-for-platforms/
├─ Scheduled tasks (cron) → cron-triggers/
├─ Lightweight edge logic (modify HTTP) → snippets/
├─ Process Worker execution events (logs/observability) → tail-workers/
└─ Optimize latency to backend infrastructure → smart-placement/
```

### "I need to store data"

```
Need storage?
├─ Key-value (config, sessions, cache) → kv/
├─ Relational SQL → d1/ (SQLite) or hyperdrive/ (existing Postgres/MySQL)
├─ Object/file storage (S3-compatible) → r2/
├─ Message queue (async processing) → queues/
├─ Vector embeddings (AI/semantic search) → vectorize/
├─ Strongly-consistent per-entity state → durable-objects/ (DO storage)
├─ Secrets management → secrets-store/
├─ Streaming ETL to R2 → pipelines/
└─ Persistent cache (long-term retention) → cache-reserve/
```

### "I need AI/ML"

```
Need AI?
├─ Run inference (LLMs, embeddings, images) → workers-ai/
├─ Vector database for RAG/search → vectorize/
├─ Build stateful AI agents → agents-sdk/
├─ Gateway for any AI provider (caching, routing) → ai-gateway/
└─ AI-powered search widget → ai-search/
```

### "I need networking/connectivity"

```
Need networking?
├─ Expose local service to internet → tunnel/
├─ TCP/UDP proxy (non-HTTP) → spectrum/
├─ WebRTC TURN server → turn/
├─ Private network connectivity → network-interconnect/
├─ Optimize routing → argo-smart-routing/
├─ Optimize latency to backend (not user) → smart-placement/
└─ Real-time video/audio → realtimekit/ or realtime-sfu/
```

### "I need security"

```
Need security?
├─ Web Application Firewall → waf/
├─ DDoS protection → ddos/
├─ Bot detection/management → bot-management/
├─ API protection → api-shield/
├─ CAPTCHA alternative → turnstile/
└─ Credential leak detection → waf/ (managed ruleset)
```

### "I need media/content"

```
Need media?
├─ Image optimization/transformation → images/
├─ Video streaming/encoding → stream/
├─ Browser automation/screenshots → browser-rendering/
└─ Third-party script management → zaraz/
```

### "I need infrastructure-as-code"

```
Need IaC? → pulumi/ (Pulumi), terraform/ (Terraform), or api/ (REST API)
```

## Troubleshooting

### Escalated Network Access

If deployment fails due to network issues (timeouts, DNS errors, connection resets), rerun the deploy with escalated permissions (use `sandbox_permissions=require_escalated`). The deploy requires escalated network access when sandbox networking blocks outbound requests.

Example guidance to the user:

```
The deploy needs escalated network access to deploy to Cloudflare. I can rerun the command with escalated permissions—want me to proceed?
```

name: Release

on:
  workflow_run:
    workflows: ["CI"]
    types: [completed]
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  release-plz-update:
    name: Release-plz update
    if: |
      github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
      (github.event_name == 'workflow_run' && github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'success')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Install Rust toolchain
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - name: Install release-plz CLI
        run: cargo install --locked release-plz --version 0.3.155
      - name: Run release-plz update
        run: release-plz update --config release-plz.toml
      - name: Detect update changes
        id: changes
        run: |
          if git diff --quiet; then
            echo "updated=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "updated=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi
      - name: Commit and push update
        if: steps.changes.outputs.updated == 'true'
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add -A
          git commit -m "chore(release): apply release-plz update"
          git push origin HEAD:main

  release-plz-release:
    name: Release-plz release
    needs: release-plz-update
    if: |
      github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
      (github.event_name == 'workflow_run' && github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'success')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          ref: main
      - name: Install Rust toolchain
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - name: Run release-plz
        uses: release-plz/action@v0.5
        with:
          command: release
        env:
          GITHUB_[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL] secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          CARGO_REGISTRY_[REDACTED_CREDENTIAL] secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN }}

#!/bin/sh
# Pre-commit hook: keep this fast as an early validation gate
set -e

ROOT_DIR=$(pwd)

run_cargo() {
  if command -v rustup >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    RUSTC_BIN=$(rustup which --toolchain stable rustc 2>/dev/null || true)
    CARGO_BIN=$(rustup which --toolchain stable cargo 2>/dev/null || true)
    if [ -n "$RUSTC_BIN" ] && [ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]; then
      RUSTC_VER=$("$RUSTC_BIN" --version | awk '{print $2}' | tr '.' '_')
      TOOLCHAIN_BIN=$(dirname "$RUSTC_BIN")
      PATH="$TOOLCHAIN_BIN:$PATH" RUSTC="$RUSTC_BIN" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="$ROOT_DIR/target-rustup-$RUSTC_VER" "$CARGO_BIN" "$@"
      return
    fi
  fi

  cargo "$@"
}

# Cargo.lock 변경 감지를 위한 스냅샷
LOCK_HASH_BEFORE=$(shasum Cargo.lock 2>/dev/null || echo "none")

if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Running content contract check..."
  node scripts/verify-content-contract.mjs --check
  echo "Running session-review workflow check..."
  node scripts/check-session-review-workflow.mjs
else
  echo "WARNING: node not found; skipping content contract check."
fi

echo "Running cargo fmt check..."
run_cargo fmt --all -- --check

echo "Running daemon smoke tests..."
run_cargo test -p opensession-daemon --quiet

# Cargo.lock 변경 여부 확인
LOCK_HASH_AFTER=$(shasum Cargo.lock 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
if [ "$LOCK_HASH_BEFORE" != "$LOCK_HASH_AFTER" ]; then
  echo ""
  echo "ERROR: Cargo.lock was modified during pre-commit checks."
  echo "Please stage the updated Cargo.lock and re-run pre-commit:"
  echo "  git add Cargo.lock && git commit"
  exit 1
fi

echo "Fast pre-commit checks passed."

            RUSTC_VER=$("$RUSTC_BIN" --version | awk '{print $2}' | tr '.' '_')
            TOOLCHAIN_BIN=$(dirname "$RUSTC_BIN")
            PATH="$TOOLCHAIN_BIN:$PATH" RUSTC="$RUSTC_BIN" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="$ROOT_DIR/target-rustup-$RUSTC_VER" "$CARGO_BIN" "$@"
            return
        fi
    fi

    cargo "$@"
}

use std::path::{Path, PathBuf};
use std::process::Command;

use anyhow::{bail, Context, Result};

/// Git hook types managed by opensession.
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub enum HookType {
    PrePush,
}

impl HookType {
    /// The filename used in `.git/hooks/`.
    pub fn filename(&self) -> &'static str {
        match self {
            Self::PrePush => "pre-push",
        }
    }

    pub fn all() -> &'static [HookType] {
        &[Self::PrePush]
    }
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Hook templates
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const PRE_PUSH_HOOK: &str = r#"#!/bin/sh
# opensession-managed — do not edit
# Best-effort ledger fanout + secret scan.

remote="$1"
_url="$2"

YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
RED='\033[1;31m'
NC='\033[0m'

found_secrets=0
fanout_failed=0
strict_mode=0
fanout_mode="hidden_ref"
notes_ref="refs/notes/opensession"

case "${OPENSESSION_STRICT:-0}" in
    1|true|TRUE|yes|on)
        strict_mode=1
        ;;
esac

if [ "${OPENSESSION_INTERNAL_PUSH:-}" = "1" ]; then
    exit 0
fi

backup_hook="$(dirname "$0")/pre-push.pre-opensession"
if [ -f "$backup_hook" ]; then
    sh "$backup_hook" "$@" || exit $?
fi

tmp_fanout="/tmp/opensession-ledger-fanout.$$"
: > "$tmp_fanout"
tmp_notes="/tmp/opensession-notes-fanout.$$"
: > "$tmp_notes"

opsession_bin=""
shim_bin="${HOME}/.local/share/opensession/bin/opensession"
if [ -x "$shim_bin" ]; then
    opsession_bin="$shim_bin"
elif command -v opensession >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    opsession_bin="$(command -v opensession)"
fi

fanout_enabled=0
if [ -n "$opsession_bin" ]; then
    fanout_enabled=1
    detected_mode=$("$opsession_bin" setup --print-fanout-mode 2>/dev/null || true)
    case "$detected_mode" in
        hidden_ref|git_notes)
            fanout_mode="$detected_mode"
            ;;
    esac
fi

while read local_ref local_oid remote_ref remote_oid; do
    # Skip delete pushes
    if [ "$local_oid" = "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ]; then
        continue
    fi

    case "$local_ref" in
        refs/heads/*)
            if [ "$fanout_enabled" -eq 1 ]; then
                branch="${local_ref#refs/heads/}"
                "$opsession_bin" setup --sync-branch-session "$branch" --sync-branch-commit "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
                ledger_ref=$("$opsession_bin" setup --print-ledger-ref "$branch" 2>/dev/null || true)
                if [ -n "$ledger_ref" ]; then
                    printf '%s\n' "$ledger_ref" >> "$tmp_fanout"
                fi
                if [ "$fanout_mode" = "git_notes" ]; then
                    printf '%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$branch" "$local_ref" "$local_oid" >> "$tmp_notes"
                fi
            fi
            ;;
    esac

    # Determine the range to check
    if [ "$remote_oid" = "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ]; then
        # New branch — check all commits
        range="$local_oid"
    else
        range="$remote_oid..$local_oid"
    fi

    # Check diff content for secret patterns
    git diff "$range" -- 2>/dev/null | grep -nE \
        '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|gho_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC )?PRIVATE KEY-----|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\s*=|OPENAI_API_KEY\s*=|AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY\s*=|DATABASE_URL\s*=.*password)' \
        > /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$ 2>/dev/null

    if [ -s /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$ ]; then
        found_secrets=1
        printf "${RED}[opensession]${NC} Potential secrets detected in push to ${remote}:\n"
        echo ""
        while IFS= read -r line; do
            printf "  ${YELLOW}!${NC}  %s\n" "$line"
        done < /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$
        echo ""
    fi

    rm -f /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$
done

if [ "$fanout_enabled" -eq 0 ]; then
    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: opensession CLI/shim not found; skipping ledger fanout.\n"
    if [ "$strict_mode" -eq 1 ]; then
        printf "${RED}[opensession]${NC} Error: OPENSESSION_STRICT=1 and fanout helper is unavailable.\n"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    tmp_sorted="${tmp_fanout}.sorted"
    sort -u "$tmp_fanout" > "$tmp_sorted" 2>/dev/null
    while IFS= read -r ledger_ref; do
        [ -z "$ledger_ref" ] && continue
        # No local ledger yet for this branch; skip silently.
        if ! git show-ref --verify --quiet "$ledger_ref"; then
            continue
        fi

        push_ok=0
        for attempt in 1 2; do
            if OPENSESSION_INTERNAL_PUSH=1 git push --no-verify "$remote" "$ledger_ref:$ledger_ref" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                push_ok=1
                break
            fi
            # Best-effort retry for transient network/remote races.
            sleep 1
        done

        if [ "$push_ok" -ne 1 ]; then
            fanout_failed=1
            printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: failed to push ledger ref %s\n" "$ledger_ref"
        fi
    done < "$tmp_sorted"
    rm -f "$tmp_sorted"

    if [ "$fanout_mode" = "git_notes" ]; then
        tmp_notes_sorted="${tmp_notes}.sorted"
        sort -u "$tmp_notes" > "$tmp_notes_sorted" 2>/dev/null
        while IFS="$(printf '\t')" read -r branch local_ref local_oid; do
            [ -z "$local_oid" ] && continue

            # Keep existing commit notes stable across repeated pushes.
            if git notes --ref=opensession show "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                continue
            fi

            copied_from=""
            parent_oids=$(git show -s --format=%P "$local_oid" 2>/dev/null || true)
            if [ -n "$parent_oids" ]; then
                first_parent=$(printf '%s\n' "$parent_oids" | awk '{print $1}')
                other_parents=$(printf '%s\n' "$parent_oids" | cut -d' ' -f2-)

                # Prefer non-first parents for merge commits (PR head side).
                for parent_oid in $other_parents; do
                    if git notes --ref=opensession show "$parent_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                        if git notes --ref=opensession copy -f "$parent_oid" "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                            copied_from="$parent_oid"
                            break
                        fi
                    fi
                done

                if [ -z "$copied_from" ] && [ -n "$first_parent" ]; then
                    if git notes --ref=opensession show "$first_parent" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                        if git notes --ref=opensession copy -f "$first_parent" "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                            copied_from="$first_parent"
                        fi
                    fi
                fi
            fi

            if [ -z "$copied_from" ]; then
                note_body=$(cat <<EOF
opensession fanout mode: git_notes
branch: $branch
local_ref: $local_ref
commit: $local_oid
generated_at: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
EOF
)
                if ! git notes --ref=opensession add -f -m "$note_body" "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                    fanout_failed=1
                    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: failed to write git note for %s\n" "$local_oid"
                fi
            fi
        done < "$tmp_notes_sorted"
        rm -f "$tmp_notes_sorted"

        if git show-ref --verify --quiet "$notes_ref"; then
            if ! OPENSESSION_INTERNAL_PUSH=1 git push --no-verify "$remote" "$notes_ref:$notes_ref" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                fanout_failed=1
                printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: failed to push notes ref %s\n" "$notes_ref"
            fi
        fi
    fi
fi

rm -f "$tmp_fanout"
rm -f "$tmp_notes"

if [ "$found_secrets" -eq 1 ]; then
    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: potential secrets detected. Review before pushing.\n"
    echo "  To push anyway: git push --no-verify"
    echo ""
    # Warning only — don't block the push by default
    # To make it blocking, uncomment: exit 1
    exit 0
fi

if [ "$fanout_failed" -eq 1 ]; then
    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: one or more ledger fanout pushes failed.\n"
    if [ "$strict_mode" -eq 1 ]; then
        printf "${RED}[opensession]${NC} Error: OPENSESSION_STRICT=1 and fanout push failed.\n"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

exit 0
"#;

/// Generate the hook script content for a given hook type.
pub fn hook_template(hook_type: HookType) -> &'static str {
    match hook_type {
        HookType::PrePush => PRE_PUSH_HOOK,
    }
}

fn ensure_git_repo(repo_root: &Path) -> Result<()> {
    if repo_root.join(".git").exists() {
        return Ok(());
    }
    bail!(
        "Not a git repository: {} (missing .git metadata)",
        repo_root.display()
    );
}

이건 어떤 경고야? 합리적인 경고라고 할수 있음 ?
**Explaining warning rationality and handling**
**Explaining warning rationality and handling**

세 경고는 전부 “기능 고장”이 아니라 “권장 운영 모드 미준수” 알림입니다.

- `[WARN] opensession hooks: none`  
  - 의미: `pre-push` 훅이 없어서 자동 fanout/secret-scan이 안 돎.
- `[WARN] review readiness: hidden-fanout=missing hidden-refs=none-fetched`  
  - 의미: 로컬 review 워크플로 준비가 안 됨(훅 없음 + 원격 hidden ref 미fetch).
- `[WARN] daemon: not running ...`  
  - 의미: 백그라운드 자동 수집/동기화가 꺼져 있음.

합리성 판단:
- “install-and-forget 풀 워크플로” 기준이면 **합리적인 WARN** 맞습니다.
- 수동으로만 쓰는 경우(daemon 안 쓰고, review fanout 안 쓰는 경우)엔 **과한 WARN**처럼 보일 수 있습니다.

즉, 경고 자체는 맞지만 지금은 보수적으로 잡혀 있어요.  
원하면 다음 단계로 `manual-only` 사용자는 `WARN`을 `INFO`로 낮추거나 중복 경고(`hooks` + `review readiness`)를 줄이게 바로 조정해드릴 수 있습니다.

- 현재 실제 실행 바이너리(`active binary`) 표시로 설치/로컬빌드 가시성 강화

#![allow(dead_code)]

use std::path::{Path, PathBuf};
use std::process::Command;

use anyhow::{bail, Context, Result};

/// Git hook types managed by opensession.
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub enum HookType {
    PrePush,
}

impl HookType {
    /// The filename used in `.git/hooks/`.
    pub fn filename(&self) -> &'static str {
        match self {
            Self::PrePush => "pre-push",
        }
    }

    pub fn all() -> &'static [HookType] {
        &[Self::PrePush]
    }
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Hook templates
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const PRE_PUSH_HOOK: &str = r#"#!/bin/sh
# opensession-managed — do not edit
# Best-effort ledger fanout + secret scan.

remote="$1"
_url="$2"

YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
RED='\033[1;31m'
NC='\033[0m'

found_secrets=0
fanout_failed=0
strict_mode=0
fanout_mode="hidden_ref"
notes_ref="refs/notes/opensession"

case "${OPENSESSION_STRICT:-0}" in
    1|true|TRUE|yes|on)
        strict_mode=1
        ;;
esac

if [ "${OPENSESSION_INTERNAL_PUSH:-}" = "1" ]; then
    exit 0
fi

backup_hook="$(dirname "$0")/pre-push.pre-opensession"
if [ -f "$backup_hook" ]; then
    sh "$backup_hook" "$@" || exit $?
fi

tmp_fanout="/tmp/opensession-ledger-fanout.$$"
: > "$tmp_fanout"
tmp_notes="/tmp/opensession-notes-fanout.$$"
: > "$tmp_notes"

opsession_bin=""
shim_bin="${HOME}/.local/share/opensession/bin/opensession"
if [ -x "$shim_bin" ]; then
    opsession_bin="$shim_bin"
elif command -v opensession >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    opsession_bin="$(command -v opensession)"
fi

fanout_enabled=0
if [ -n "$opsession_bin" ]; then
    fanout_enabled=1
    detected_mode=$("$opsession_bin" setup --print-fanout-mode 2>/dev/null || true)
    case "$detected_mode" in
        hidden_ref|git_notes)
            fanout_mode="$detected_mode"
            ;;
    esac
fi

while read local_ref local_oid remote_ref remote_oid; do
    # Skip delete pushes
    if [ "$local_oid" = "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ]; then
        continue
    fi

    case "$local_ref" in
        refs/heads/*)
            if [ "$fanout_enabled" -eq 1 ]; then
                branch="${local_ref#refs/heads/}"
                "$opsession_bin" setup --sync-branch-session "$branch" --sync-branch-commit "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
                ledger_ref=$("$opsession_bin" setup --print-ledger-ref "$branch" 2>/dev/null || true)
                if [ -n "$ledger_ref" ]; then
                    printf '%s\n' "$ledger_ref" >> "$tmp_fanout"
                fi
                if [ "$fanout_mode" = "git_notes" ]; then
                    printf '%s\t%s\t%s\n' "$branch" "$local_ref" "$local_oid" >> "$tmp_notes"
                fi
            fi
            ;;
    esac

    # Determine the range to check
    if [ "$remote_oid" = "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ]; then
        # New branch — check all commits
        range="$local_oid"
    else
        range="$remote_oid..$local_oid"
    fi

    # Check diff content for secret patterns
    git diff "$range" -- 2>/dev/null | grep -nE \
        '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|gho_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC )?PRIVATE KEY-----|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\s*=|OPENAI_API_KEY\s*=|AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY\s*=|DATABASE_URL\s*=.*password)' \
        > /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$ 2>/dev/null

    if [ -s /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$ ]; then
        found_secrets=1
        printf "${RED}[opensession]${NC} Potential secrets detected in push to ${remote}:\n"
        echo ""
        while IFS= read -r line; do
            printf "  ${YELLOW}!${NC}  %s\n" "$line"
        done < /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$
        echo ""
    fi

    rm -f /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$
done

if [ "$fanout_enabled" -eq 0 ]; then
    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: opensession CLI/shim not found; skipping ledger fanout.\n"
    if [ "$strict_mode" -eq 1 ]; then
        printf "${RED}[opensession]${NC} Error: OPENSESSION_STRICT=1 and fanout helper is unavailable.\n"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    tmp_sorted="${tmp_fanout}.sorted"
    sort -u "$tmp_fanout" > "$tmp_sorted" 2>/dev/null
    while IFS= read -r ledger_ref; do
        [ -z "$ledger_ref" ] && continue
        # No local ledger yet for this branch; skip silently.
        if ! git show-ref --verify --quiet "$ledger_ref"; then
            continue
        fi

        push_ok=0
        for attempt in 1 2; do
            if OPENSESSION_INTERNAL_PUSH=1 git push --no-verify "$remote" "$ledger_ref:$ledger_ref" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                push_ok=1
                break
            fi
            # Best-effort retry for transient network/remote races.
            sleep 1
        done

        if [ "$push_ok" -ne 1 ]; then
            fanout_failed=1
            printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: failed to push ledger ref %s\n" "$ledger_ref"
        fi
    done < "$tmp_sorted"
    rm -f "$tmp_sorted"

    if [ "$fanout_mode" = "git_notes" ]; then
        tmp_notes_sorted="${tmp_notes}.sorted"
        sort -u "$tmp_notes" > "$tmp_notes_sorted" 2>/dev/null
        while IFS="$(printf '\t')" read -r branch local_ref local_oid; do
            [ -z "$local_oid" ] && continue

            # Keep existing commit notes stable across repeated pushes.
            if git notes --ref=opensession show "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                continue
            fi

            copied_from=""
            parent_oids=$(git show -s --format=%P "$local_oid" 2>/dev/null || true)
            if [ -n "$parent_oids" ]; then
                first_parent=$(printf '%s\n' "$parent_oids" | awk '{print $1}')
                other_parents=$(printf '%s\n' "$parent_oids" | cut -d' ' -f2-)

                # Prefer non-first parents for merge commits (PR head side).
                for parent_oid in $other_parents; do
                    if git notes --ref=opensession show "$parent_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                        if git notes --ref=opensession copy -f "$parent_oid" "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                            copied_from="$parent_oid"
                            break
                        fi
                    fi
                done

                if [ -z "$copied_from" ] && [ -n "$first_parent" ]; then
                    if git notes --ref=opensession show "$first_parent" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                        if git notes --ref=opensession copy -f "$first_parent" "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                            copied_from="$first_parent"
                        fi
                    fi
                fi
            fi

            if [ -z "$copied_from" ]; then
                note_body=$(cat <<EOF
opensession fanout mode: git_notes
branch: $branch
local_ref: $local_ref
commit: $local_oid
generated_at: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
EOF
)
                if ! git notes --ref=opensession add -f -m "$note_body" "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                    fanout_failed=1
                    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: failed to write git note for %s\n" "$local_oid"
                fi
            fi
        done < "$tmp_notes_sorted"
        rm -f "$tmp_notes_sorted"

        if git show-ref --verify --quiet "$notes_ref"; then
            if ! OPENSESSION_INTERNAL_PUSH=1 git push --no-verify "$remote" "$notes_ref:$notes_ref" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                fanout_failed=1
                printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: failed to push notes ref %s\n" "$notes_ref"
            fi
        fi
    fi
fi

rm -f "$tmp_fanout"
rm -f "$tmp_notes"

if [ "$found_secrets" -eq 1 ]; then
    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: potential secrets detected. Review before pushing.\n"
    echo "  To push anyway: git push --no-verify"
    echo ""
    # Warning only — don't block the push by default
    # To make it blocking, uncomment: exit 1
    exit 0
fi

if [ "$fanout_failed" -eq 1 ]; then
    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: one or more ledger fanout pushes failed.\n"
    if [ "$strict_mode" -eq 1 ]; then
        printf "${RED}[opensession]${NC} Error: OPENSESSION_STRICT=1 and fanout push failed.\n"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

exit 0
"#;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const HOOK_MARKER: &str = "# opensession-managed";

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Hook template accessor

- pre-push에서 실행되는 핵심 호출: [`~/opensession/crates/cli/src/hooks.rs:97`](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/hooks.rs:97), [`~/opensession/crates/cli/src/hooks.rs:98`](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/hooks.rs:98)
- 역할: 푸시 직전에 branch session/ledger fanout 정합성 보장

2. **Daemon (상시 백그라운드 자동화)**

- 역할: 파일 변경 감시, 세션 자동 처리

- hook가 호출하는 sync 경로에서 daemon config를 읽음: [`~/opensession/crates/cli/src/setup_cmd.rs:377`](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/setup_cmd.rs:377), [`~/opensession/crates/cli/src/setup_cmd.rs:387`](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/setup_cmd.rs:387)

     7	
     8	OpenSession은 AI 세션 로그를 로컬 우선(local-first)으로 기록/등록/공유/검토하는 워크플로입니다.
     9	
    10	웹: [opensession.io](https://opensession.io)  
    11	문서: [opensession.io/docs](https://opensession.io/docs)
    12	
    13	## DX 리셋 v1
    14	
    15	CLI/Web/API 계약은 3가지 동작으로 정리되었습니다.
    16	
    17	- `register`: canonical HAIL JSONL을 로컬 저장소에 등록 (네트워크 부작용 없음)
    18	- `share`: Source URI를 공유 가능한 출력으로 변환
    19	- `handoff`: 불변(immutable) 아티팩트를 생성하고 alias를 관리
    20	
    21	레거시 표면은 제거되었습니다.
    22	
    23	- `opensession publish ...` 제거
    24	- `opensession session handoff ...` 제거
    25	- 레거시 단축 라우트(`/git`, `/gh/*`, `/resolve/*`)는 더 이상 제공되지 않으며 의도적으로 404를 반환
    26	- `/api/ingest/preview` 제거 (`/api/parse/preview` 사용)
    27	
    28	## URI 모델
    29	
    30	- `os://src/local/<sha256>`
    31	- `os://src/gh/<owner>/<repo>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
    32	- `os://src/gl/<project_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
    33	- `os://src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
    34	- `os://artifact/<sha256>`
    35	
    36	인코딩 규칙:
    37	
    38	- `ref_enc`: RFC3986 percent-encoding
    39	- `project_b64`, `remote_b64`: base64url(no padding)
    40	
    41	## 설치
    42	
    43	```bash
    44	cargo install opensession
    45	```
    46	
    47	사용자 표면은 `opensession` CLI입니다. 자동 세션 수집(auto-capture)을 쓰려면 daemon 프로세스가 추가로 실행 중이어야 합니다.
    48	
    49	## Install-and-Forget 설정
    50	
    51	```bash
    52	# 1) 로컬 설정 진단 (flutter doctor 스타일)
    53	opensession doctor
    54	
    55	# 2) 권장 설치값 자동 적용 (hooks/shims/fanout defaults)
    56	opensession doctor --fix
    57	
    58	# 3) 선택: fanout 모드를 명시적으로 지정
    59	opensession doctor --fix --fanout-mode hidden_ref
    60	```
    61	
    62	`doctor`는 내부적으로 기존 setup 파이프라인(`opensession setup` / `opensession setup --check`)을 재사용합니다.
    63	첫 적용 시 fanout 저장 모드(`hidden_ref` 또는 `git_notes`)를 선택하며, 선택값은 로컬 git 설정(`.git/config`)의 `opensession.fanout-mode`에 저장됩니다.
    64	
    65	자동 수집을 위한 daemon 실행:
    66	
    67	```bash
    68	# opensession-daemon 바이너리가 있는 경우
    69	opensession-daemon run
    70	
    71	# 소스 체크아웃에서 실행하는 경우
    72	cargo run -p opensession-daemon -- run
    73	```
    74	
    75	daemon이 없으면 parse/register/share는 수동으로 사용할 수 있지만 백그라운드 자동 수집은 동작하지 않습니다.
    76	
    77	## 빠른 시작
    78	
    79	```bash
    80	# agent-native 로그 -> canonical HAIL JSONL
    81	opensession parse --profile codex ./raw-session.jsonl > ./session.hail.jsonl
    82	
    83	# 로컬 object store 등록
    84	opensession register ./session.hail.jsonl
    85	# -> os://src/local/<sha256>
    86	
    87	# 원본 바이트 확인
    88	opensession cat os://src/local/<sha256>
    89	
    90	# 요약 메타데이터 확인
    91	opensession inspect os://src/local/<sha256>
    92	```
    93	
    94	## 공유(share)
    95	
    96	```bash
    97	# local URI -> git 공유 가능 Source URI
    98	opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin
    99	
   100	# 선택적 네트워크 변경
   101	opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin --push
   102	
   103	# remote-resolvable URI -> 웹 URL
   104	opensession config init --base-url https://opensession.io
   105	opensession share os://src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...> --web
   106	```
   107	
   108	`share --web`는 `.opensession/config.toml`이 반드시 필요합니다.
   109	
   110	## handoff
   111	
   112	```bash
   113	# 불변 artifact 생성
   114	opensession handoff build --from os://src/local/<sha256> --pin latest
   115	# -> os://artifact/<sha256>
   116	
   117	# 출력 표현 선택
   118	opensession handoff artifacts get os://artifact/<sha256> --format canonical --encode jsonl
   119	
   120	# 해시/내용 검증
   121	opensession handoff artifacts verify os://artifact/<sha256>
   122	
   123	# alias 관리
   124	opensession handoff artifacts pin latest os://artifact/<sha256>
   125	opensession handoff artifacts unpin latest
   126	
   127	# 삭제 정책: unpinned만 삭제 가능
   128	opensession handoff artifacts rm os://artifact/<sha256>
   129	```
   130	
   131	## Canonical 웹 라우트
   132	
   133	- `/src/gh/<owner>/<repo>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
   134	- `/src/gl/<project_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
   135	- `/src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
   136	
   137	## API 표면(v1)
   138	
   139	- `GET /api/health`
   140	- `GET /api/capabilities`
   141	- `POST /api/parse/preview`
   142	- `GET /api/sessions`
   143	- `GET /api/sessions/{id}`
   144	- `GET /api/sessions/{id}/raw`
   145	- `DELETE /api/admin/sessions/{id}` (`X-OpenSession-Admin-Key` 필요)
   146	
   147	## 로컬 개발 검증
   148	
   149	```bash
   150	# 필수 훅 게이트
   151	./.githooks/pre-commit
   152	./.githooks/pre-push
   153	```
   154	
   155	```bash
   156	# 웹 런타임 검증
   157	npx wrangler dev --ip 127.0.0.1 --port 8788 --persist-to .wrangler/state
   158	BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8788 npx playwright test e2e/git-share.spec.ts --config playwright.config.ts

   257	const HOOK_MARKER: &str = "# opensession-managed";
   258	
   259	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   260	// Hook template accessor

   262	
   263	/// Generate the hook script content for a given hook type.
   264	pub fn hook_template(hook_type: HookType) -> &'static str {
   265	    match hook_type {
   266	        HookType::PrePush => PRE_PUSH_HOOK,
   267	    }
   268	}
   269	
   270	fn ensure_git_repo(repo_root: &Path) -> Result<()> {
   271	    if repo_root.join(".git").exists() {
   272	        return Ok(());
   273	    }
   274	    bail!(
   275	        "Not a git repository: {} (missing .git metadata)",
   276	        repo_root.display()
   277	    );
   278	}
   279	
   280	fn configured_hooks_path(repo_root: &Path) -> Option<PathBuf> {
   281	    let output = Command::new("git")
   282	        .arg("-C")
   283	        .arg(repo_root)
   284	        .arg("config")
   285	        .arg("--local")
   286	        .arg("--get")
   287	        .arg("core.hooksPath")
   288	        .output()
   289	        .ok()?;
   290	    if !output.status.success() {
   291	        return None;
   292	    }
   293	    let raw = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout).trim().to_string();
   294	    if raw.is_empty() {
   295	        return None;
   296	    }
   297	    let path = PathBuf::from(raw);
   298	    if path.is_absolute() {
   299	        Some(path)
   300	    } else {
   301	        Some(repo_root.join(path))
   302	    }
   303	}
   304	
   305	fn hooks_dir(repo_root: &Path) -> PathBuf {
   306	    configured_hooks_path(repo_root).unwrap_or_else(|| repo_root.join(".git").join("hooks"))
   307	}
   308	
   309	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   310	// Hook installer
   311	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   312	
   313	/// Install opensession git hooks into a repository.
   314	pub fn install_hooks(repo_root: &Path, hooks: &[HookType]) -> Result<Vec<HookType>> {
   315	    ensure_git_repo(repo_root)?;
   316	    let hooks_dir = hooks_dir(repo_root);
   317	    std::fs::create_dir_all(&hooks_dir)
   318	        .with_context(|| format!("create hooks directory {}", hooks_dir.display()))?;
   319	
   320	    let mut installed = Vec::new();
   321	    for hook_type in hooks {
   322	        let hook_path = hooks_dir.join(hook_type.filename());
   323	
   324	        // Check if there's an existing non-opensession hook
   325	        if hook_path.exists() {
   326	            let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&hook_path)
   327	                .with_context(|| format!("read existing hook {}", hook_path.display()))?;
   328	            if !content.contains(HOOK_MARKER) {
   329	                // Backup existing hook
   330	                let backup_path =
   331	                    hooks_dir.join(format!("{}.pre-opensession", hook_type.filename()));
   332	                std::fs::rename(&hook_path, &backup_path).with_context(|| {
   333	                    format!("backup existing hook to {}", backup_path.display())
   334	                })?;
   335	            }
   336	            // If it contains HOOK_MARKER, we'll just overwrite with new version
   337	        }
   338	
   339	        let template = hook_template(*hook_type);
   340	        std::fs::write(&hook_path, template)
   341	            .with_context(|| format!("write hook {}", hook_path.display()))?;
   342	
   343	        // Make executable on Unix
   344	        #[cfg(unix)]
   345	        {
   346	            use std::os::unix::fs::PermissionsExt;
   347	            let perms = std::fs::Permissions::from_mode(0o755);
   348	            std::fs::set_permissions(&hook_path, perms)
   349	                .with_context(|| format!("chmod hook {}", hook_path.display()))?;
   350	        }
   351	
   352	        installed.push(*hook_type);
   353	    }
   354	
   355	    Ok(installed)
   356	}
   357	
   358	/// Uninstall opensession git hooks from a repository.
   359	pub fn uninstall_hooks(repo_root: &Path, hooks: &[HookType]) -> Result<Vec<HookType>> {
   360	    if !repo_root.join(".git").exists() {
   361	        return Ok(Vec::new());
   362	    }
   363	    let hooks_dir = hooks_dir(repo_root);
   364	    let mut uninstalled = Vec::new();
   365	
   366	    for hook_type in hooks {
   367	        let hook_path = hooks_dir.join(hook_type.filename());
   368	        if !hook_path.exists() {
   369	            continue;
   370	        }
   371	
   372	        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&hook_path).unwrap_or_default();
   373	        if !content.contains(HOOK_MARKER) {
   374	            continue; // Not our hook
   375	        }
   376	
   377	        std::fs::remove_file(&hook_path)?;
   378	
   379	        // Restore backup if exists
   380	        let backup_path = hooks_dir.join(format!("{}.pre-opensession", hook_type.filename()));

     1	# Documentation
     2	
     3	OpenSession is a local-first workflow for registering, sharing, and inspecting AI session traces.
     4	The public contract is a single Source URI model shared by CLI, Web, and API.
     5	
     6	## Getting Started
     7	
     8	Core principles:
     9	
    10	- One concept, one name.
    11	- One identity, one URI.
    12	- No implicit network mutation.
    13	- Defaults are allowed only when printed in output.
    14	
    15	Quick path:
    16	
    17	```bash
    18	# 1) Parse agent-native logs into canonical HAIL JSONL
    19	opensession parse --profile codex ./raw-session.jsonl > ./session.hail.jsonl
    20	
    21	# 2) Register canonical session in local object store
    22	opensession register ./session.hail.jsonl
    23	# -> os://src/local/<sha256>
    24	
    25	# 3) Read local canonical bytes back
    26	opensession cat os://src/local/<sha256>
    27	
    28	# 4) Inspect summary metadata
    29	opensession inspect os://src/local/<sha256>
    30	```
    31	
    32	Install:
    33	
    34	```bash
    35	cargo install opensession
    36	```
    37	
    38	Auto-capture note:
    39	
    40	- `opensession` covers parse/register/share/handoff.
    41	- Automatic background capture requires the daemon process (`opensession-daemon run`) to be running.
    42	
    43	Local object storage:
    44	
    45	- In repo: `.opensession/objects/sha256/ab/cd/<hash>.jsonl`
    46	- Outside repo: `~/.local/share/opensession/objects/sha256/ab/cd/<hash>.jsonl`
    47	
    48	Hash policy:
    49	
    50	- SHA-256 of canonical HAIL JSONL bytes.
    51	
    52	## Share via Git
    53	
    54	`register` is local-only. Remote sharing is explicit via `share`.
    55	
    56	```bash
    57	# Local source -> remote-shareable source URI
    58	opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin
    59	
    60	# Optional network side effect
    61	opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin --push
    62	```
    63	
    64	`share --git` rules:
    65	
    66	- Required: `--remote <name|url>`
    67	- Default ref: `refs/opensession/branches/<branch_b64url>`
    68	- Default path: `sessions/<sha256>.jsonl`
    69	- `--push` omitted: no network mutation (prints runnable push command)
    70	- Legacy fixed ref `refs/heads/opensession/sessions` is no longer used for new writes.
    71	
    72	Install-and-forget setup:
    73	
    74	```bash
    75	opensession doctor
    76	opensession doctor --fix
    77	# optional
    78	opensession doctor --fix --fanout-mode hidden_ref
    79	```
    80	
    81	- `doctor` check mode maps to `setup --check`; `doctor --fix` maps to `setup`.
    82	- Installs/updates OpenSession-managed `pre-push` hook in the current repo.
    83	- Installs/updates OpenSession shim at `~/.local/share/opensession/bin/opensession`.
    84	- On first apply, prompts for fanout mode (`hidden_ref` or `git_notes`) and stores it in local git config (`opensession.fanout-mode`).
    85	- `doctor` check output includes daemon status from `~/.config/opensession/daemon.pid`.
    86	- Start daemon with `opensession-daemon run` (or `cargo run -p opensession-daemon -- run` in a source checkout).
    87	- Does **not** modify `remote.<name>.push`.
    88	- Hook fanout push is best-effort and warning-only.
    89	- Set `OPENSESSION_STRICT=1` to fail push when fanout helper is unavailable or fanout push fails.
    90	- PR automation currently targets same-repo PRs only.
    91	- Merge/branch-delete cleanup removes ledger refs immediately; physical object removal follows remote GC policy.
    92	
    93	`share --web` rules:
    94	
    95	```bash
    96	opensession config init --base-url https://opensession.io
    97	opensession config show
    98	opensession share os://src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...> --web
    99	```
   100	
   101	- `share --web` requires explicit `.opensession/config.toml`
   102	- Local URI with `--web` is rejected with follow-up action (`share --git`)
   103	- Human output prints canonical URL as first line
   104	
   105	## Inspect Timeline
   106	
   107	Canonical web routes:
   108	
   109	- `/src/gh/<owner>/<repo>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
   110	- `/src/gl/<project_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
   111	- `/src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
   112	
   113	Legacy shortcut routes are reserved and return 404:
   114	
   115	- `/git`
   116	- `/gh/*`
   117	- `/resolve/*`
   118	
   119	Server parse-preview endpoint:
   120	
   121	- `POST /api/parse/preview`
   122	
   123	## Review View
   124	
   125	`opensession view` is the review-first entrypoint for web view.
   126	
   127	```bash
   128	# Source URI -> /src/*
   129	opensession view os://src/gl/<project_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>
   130	
   131	# Local source URI / jsonl file -> /review/local/<id>
   132	opensession view os://src/local/<sha256>
   133	opensession view ./session.hail.jsonl
   134	
   135	# Commit/ref/range -> commit-linked local review bundle
   136	opensession view HEAD
   137	opensession view main..feature/my-branch
   138	```
   139	
   140	Default mode is web. Use `--no-open` to print URL only.
   141	
   142	Local `view` targets do not require registered git credentials.
   143	They use local git objects / local source bytes and generate a local review bundle.
   144	
   145	## Handoff
   146	
   147	Handoff artifacts are immutable. Build creates a new artifact URI every time.
   148	
   149	```bash
   150	# Build immutable artifact
   151	opensession handoff build --from os://src/local/<sha256> --pin latest
   152	# -> os://artifact/<sha256>
   153	
   154	# Read payload representation
   155	opensession handoff artifacts get os://artifact/<sha256> --format canonical --encode jsonl
   156	
   157	# Verify deterministic hash
   158	opensession handoff artifacts verify os://artifact/<sha256>
   159	
   160	# Alias control
   161	opensession handoff artifacts pin latest os://artifact/<sha256>
   162	opensession handoff artifacts unpin latest
   163	
   164	# Removal policy (unpinned only)
   165	opensession handoff artifacts rm os://artifact/<sha256>
   166	```
   167	
   168	No refresh/update command exists in v1. Rebuild and move pin aliases.
   169	
   170	## Optional UI
   171	
   172	CLI is the canonical operator surface.
   173	Web and TUI are optional interfaces over the same URI contract.
   174	
   175	## Concepts
   176	
   177	Source and artifact identifiers:
   178	
   179	- `os://src/local/<sha256>`
   180	- `os://src/gh/<owner>/<repo>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
   181	- `os://src/gl/<project_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
   182	- `os://src/git/<remote_b64>/ref/<ref_enc>/path/<path...>`
   183	- `os://artifact/<sha256>`
   184	
   185	Encoding rules:
   186	
   187	- `ref_enc`: RFC3986 percent-encoding
   188	- `project_b64`, `remote_b64`: base64url (no padding)
   189	
   190	API boundary:
   191	
   192	- `DELETE /api/admin/sessions/{id}`
   193	- Header: `X-OpenSession-Admin-Key`

     9	# OpenSession
    10	
    11	> Open-source platform for recording, sharing, and analyzing AI coding sessions.
    12	
    13	OpenSession captures Human-AI Interaction Logs (HAIL) from tools like Claude Code, \
    14	Cursor, and Codex, then provides a timeline viewer, repo analytics, and search.
    15	
    16	## Docs
    17

    19	
    20	## API
    21	
    22	Base URL: `/api`
    23	
    24	- `POST /api/parse/preview` — Preview parser output from source descriptors
    25	- `GET /api/review/local/:review_id` — Load local PR review bundle (local mode)
    26	- `GET /api/sessions` — List sessions
    27	- `GET /api/sessions/:id` — Get session detail
    28	- `GET /api/sessions/:id/raw` — Download raw HAIL JSONL
    29	- `DELETE /api/admin/sessions/:id` — Delete session (admin key)
    30	
    31	## Open Source

    33	- [GitHub](https://github.com/hwisu/opensession)
    34	- Local server: `cargo run -p opensession-server`
    35	- CLI: `cargo install opensession`
    36	";
    37	
    38	pub async fn handle(headers: HeaderMap) -> Response {
    39	    let accept = headers
    40	        .get("accept")
    41	        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())
    42	        .unwrap_or("");
    43	
    44	    if accept.contains("text/markdown") {
    45	        return (
    46	            StatusCode::OK,
    47	            [
    48	                (header::CONTENT_TYPE, "text/markdown; charset=utf-8"),
    49	                (header::CACHE_CONTROL, "public, max-age=3600"),
    50	            ],
    51	            DOCS_MD,
    52	        )
    53	            .into_response();
    54	    }
    55	
    56	    // For browsers: serve index.html (SPA routing)

     2	# Pre-commit hook: keep this fast as an early validation gate
     3	set -e

     5	ROOT_DIR=$(pwd)
     6	
     7	run_cargo() {
     8	  if command -v rustup >/dev/null 2>&1; then

    10	    CARGO_BIN=$(rustup which --toolchain stable cargo 2>/dev/null || true)
    11	    if [ -n "$RUSTC_BIN" ] && [ -n "$CARGO_BIN" ]; then
    12	      RUSTC_VER=$("$RUSTC_BIN" --version | awk '{print $2}' | tr '.' '_')
    13	      TOOLCHAIN_BIN=$(dirname "$RUSTC_BIN")
    14	      PATH="$TOOLCHAIN_BIN:$PATH" RUSTC="$RUSTC_BIN" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="$ROOT_DIR/target-rustup-$RUSTC_VER" "$CARGO_BIN" "$@"
    15	      return
    16	    fi
    17	  fi
    18	
    19	  cargo "$@"
    20	}
    21	
    22	# Cargo.lock 변경 감지를 위한 스냅샷
    23	LOCK_HASH_BEFORE=$(shasum Cargo.lock 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
    24	
    25	if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    26	  echo "Running content contract check..."
    27	  node scripts/verify-content-contract.mjs --check
    28	  echo "Running session-review workflow check..."
    29	  node scripts/check-session-review-workflow.mjs
    30	  echo "Running publishable dependency check..."
    31	  node scripts/check-publishable-deps.mjs
    32	else
    33	  echo "WARNING: node not found; skipping content contract check."
    34	fi
    35	
    36	echo "Running cargo fmt check..."
    37	run_cargo fmt --all -- --check
    38	
    39	echo "Running daemon smoke tests..."
    40	run_cargo test -p opensession-daemon --quiet
    41	
    42	# Cargo.lock 변경 여부 확인
    43	LOCK_HASH_AFTER=$(shasum Cargo.lock 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
    44	if [ "$LOCK_HASH_BEFORE" != "$LOCK_HASH_AFTER" ]; then
    45	  echo ""
    46	  echo "ERROR: Cargo.lock was modified during pre-commit checks."
    47	  echo "Please stage the updated Cargo.lock and re-run pre-commit:"
    48	  echo "  git add Cargo.lock && git commit"
    49	  exit 1
    50	fi
    51	
    52	echo "Fast pre-commit checks passed."

    80	    if [ "$remote_oid" = "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ]; then
    81	        # New branch — check all commits
    82	        range="$local_oid"
    83	    else
    84	        range="$remote_oid..$local_oid"
    85	    fi
    86	
    87	    # Check diff content for secret patterns
    88	    git diff "$range" -- 2>/dev/null | grep -nE \
    89	        '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|gho_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC )?PRIVATE KEY-----|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\s*=|OPENAI_API_KEY\s*=|AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY\s*=|DATABASE_URL\s*=.*password)' \
    90	        > /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$ 2>/dev/null
    91	
    92	    if [ -s /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$ ]; then
    93	        found_secrets=1
    94	        printf "${RED}[opensession]${NC} Potential secrets detected in push to ${remote}:\n"
    95	        echo ""
    96	        while IFS= read -r line; do
    97	            printf "  ${YELLOW}!${NC}  %s\n" "$line"
    98	        done < /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$
    99	        echo ""
   100	    fi
   101	
   102	    rm -f /tmp/opensession-secret-scan.$$
   103	done
   104	
   105	if [ "$fanout_enabled" -eq 0 ]; then
   106	    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: opensession CLI/shim not found; skipping ledger fanout.\n"
   107	    if [ "$strict_mode" -eq 1 ]; then
   108	        printf "${RED}[opensession]${NC} Error: OPENSESSION_STRICT=1 and fanout helper is unavailable.\n"
   109	        exit 1
   110	    fi
   111	else
   112	    tmp_sorted="${tmp_fanout}.sorted"
   113	    sort -u "$tmp_fanout" > "$tmp_sorted" 2>/dev/null
   114	    while IFS= read -r ledger_ref; do
   115	        [ -z "$ledger_ref" ] && continue
   116	        # No local ledger yet for this branch; skip silently.
   117	        if ! git show-ref --verify --quiet "$ledger_ref"; then
   118	            continue
   119	        fi
   120	
   121	        push_ok=0
   122	        for attempt in 1 2; do
   123	            if OPENSESSION_INTERNAL_PUSH=1 git push --no-verify "$remote" "$ledger_ref:$ledger_ref" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   124	                push_ok=1
   125	                break
   126	            fi
   127	            # Best-effort retry for transient network/remote races.
   128	            sleep 1
   129	        done
   130	
   131	        if [ "$push_ok" -ne 1 ]; then
   132	            fanout_failed=1
   133	            printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: failed to push ledger ref %s\n" "$ledger_ref"
   134	        fi
   135	    done < "$tmp_sorted"
   136	    rm -f "$tmp_sorted"
   137	
   138	    if [ "$fanout_mode" = "git_notes" ]; then
   139	        tmp_notes_sorted="${tmp_notes}.sorted"
   140	        sort -u "$tmp_notes" > "$tmp_notes_sorted" 2>/dev/null
   141	        while IFS="$(printf '\t')" read -r branch local_ref local_oid; do
   142	            [ -z "$local_oid" ] && continue
   143	
   144	            # Keep existing commit notes stable across repeated pushes.
   145	            if git notes --ref=opensession show "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   146	                continue
   147	            fi
   148	
   149	            copied_from=""
   150	            parent_oids=$(git show -s --format=%P "$local_oid" 2>/dev/null || true)
   151	            if [ -n "$parent_oids" ]; then
   152	                first_parent=$(printf '%s\n' "$parent_oids" | awk '{print $1}')
   153	                other_parents=$(printf '%s\n' "$parent_oids" | cut -d' ' -f2-)
   154	
   155	                # Prefer non-first parents for merge commits (PR head side).
   156	                for parent_oid in $other_parents; do
   157	                    if git notes --ref=opensession show "$parent_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   158	                        if git notes --ref=opensession copy -f "$parent_oid" "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   159	                            copied_from="$parent_oid"
   160	                            break
   161	                        fi
   162	                    fi
   163	                done
   164	
   165	                if [ -z "$copied_from" ] && [ -n "$first_parent" ]; then
   166	                    if git notes --ref=opensession show "$first_parent" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   167	                        if git notes --ref=opensession copy -f "$first_parent" "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   168	                            copied_from="$first_parent"
   169	                        fi
   170	                    fi
   171	                fi
   172	            fi
   173	
   174	            if [ -z "$copied_from" ]; then
   175	                note_body=$(cat <<EOF
   176	opensession fanout mode: git_notes
   177	branch: $branch
   178	local_ref: $local_ref
   179	commit: $local_oid
   180	generated_at: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
   181	EOF
   182	)
   183	                if ! git notes --ref=opensession add -f -m "$note_body" "$local_oid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   184	                    fanout_failed=1
   185	                    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: failed to write git note for %s\n" "$local_oid"
   186	                fi
   187	            fi
   188	        done < "$tmp_notes_sorted"
   189	        rm -f "$tmp_notes_sorted"
   190	
   191	        if git show-ref --verify --quiet "$notes_ref"; then
   192	            if ! OPENSESSION_INTERNAL_PUSH=1 git push --no-verify "$remote" "$notes_ref:$notes_ref" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   193	                fanout_failed=1
   194	                printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: failed to push notes ref %s\n" "$notes_ref"
   195	            fi
   196	        fi
   197	    fi
   198	fi
   199	
   200	rm -f "$tmp_fanout"
   201	rm -f "$tmp_notes"
   202	
   203	if [ "$found_secrets" -eq 1 ]; then
   204	    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: potential secrets detected. Review before pushing.\n"
   205	    echo "  To push anyway: git push --no-verify"
   206	    echo ""
   207	    # Warning only — don't block the push by default
   208	    # To make it blocking, uncomment: exit 1
   209	    exit 0
   210	fi
   211	
   212	if [ "$fanout_failed" -eq 1 ]; then
   213	    printf "${YELLOW}[opensession]${NC} Warning: one or more ledger fanout pushes failed.\n"
   214	    if [ "$strict_mode" -eq 1 ]; then
   215	        printf "${RED}[opensession]${NC} Error: OPENSESSION_STRICT=1 and fanout push failed.\n"
   216	        exit 1
   217	    fi
   218	fi
   219	
   220	exit 0

<proposed_plan>
## Beginner-Friendly 온보딩/동의 플로우 개선 계획 (CLI + Docs + Landing)

### 요약
현재 흐름은 `doctor --fix`/`setup`에서 실제 변경(훅 설치, shim 설치, fanout 저장)이 즉시 적용되고, TTY에서 fanout 선택만 묻는 구조입니다.  
개선 목표는 `변경 전 명시 동의`, `non-TTY에서 암묵 기본값 제거`, `랜딩→문서→설치까지 초보자 동선 명확화`입니다.

### 현재 진단 (코드 기준)
1. `doctor`는 내부적으로 `setup` 파이프라인을 호출합니다: [doctor_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/doctor_cmd.rs).
2. 실제 설치는 `run_install`에서 fanout/shim/hook를 바로 반영합니다: [setup_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/setup_cmd.rs).
3. fanout 미설정 시 TTY에서는 선택 프롬프트, non-TTY에서는 `hidden_ref` 자동 선택입니다: [setup_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/setup_cmd.rs).
4. 웹 랜딩은 설치/동의 흐름을 직접 안내하지 않고 Docs 진입 버튼 중심입니다: [LandingPage.svelte](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/LandingPage.svelte), [DocsPage.svelte](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/DocsPage.svelte), [docs.md](~/opensession/docs.md).

### 공개 인터페이스/동작 변경
1. `opensession doctor --fix`와 `opensession setup`에 `--yes`를 추가합니다.  
`--yes` 없이 TTY에서는 반드시 확인 프롬프트를 거치고, non-TTY에서는 실패합니다.
2. non-TTY에서 fanout이 미설정이면 명시 모드(`--fanout-mode` 또는 기존 git config)가 없을 때 실패합니다.  
암묵 `hidden_ref` 자동 선택을 제거합니다.
3. `setup`에도 `--fanout-mode <hidden_ref|git_notes>`를 노출해 `doctor` 없이도 자동화 가능한 동일 계약을 제공합니다.
4. 실패 메시지는 모두 “다음 실행 명령”을 포함하도록 고정합니다.  
예: `opensession doctor --fix --yes --fanout-mode hidden_ref`.

### 구현 단계
1. 설치 변경사항 사전 계산기를 추가합니다.  
대상 파일: [setup_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/setup_cmd.rs).  
출력 항목: fanout 설정/유지, pre-push 훅 설치(기존 훅 백업 여부 포함), `opensession` shim, `ops` shim.
2. 적용 전 확인 게이트를 추가합니다.  
대상 파일: [setup_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/setup_cmd.rs), [doctor_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/doctor_cmd.rs).  
규칙:  
TTY + `--yes` 없음 -> `Apply these changes? [y/N]`  
non-TTY + `--yes` 없음 -> 에러 종료  
non-TTY + fanout 미설정 + mode 미지정 -> 에러 종료
3. 훅 백업 가시성을 강화합니다.  
대상 파일: [hooks.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/hooks.rs).  
기존 pre-push가 있으면 “백업 대상 경로/복구 방법”을 사전 계획 및 적용 결과에 명시합니다.
4. 문서/랜딩 온보딩 경로를 초보자 중심으로 재배치합니다.  
대상 파일: [docs.md](~/opensession/docs.md), [README.md](~/opensession/README.md), [README.ko.md](~/opensession/README.ko.md), [LandingPage.svelte](~/opensession/packages/ui/src/components/LandingPage.svelte).  
변경 내용:  
“3-step Quick Start(install → doctor check → doctor fix)” 고정 블록 추가,  
“`--fix`는 변경 전 동의를 받음” 명시,  
자동화용 명령(`--yes --fanout-mode ...`) 명시,  
랜딩 CTA를 `/docs#getting-started`로 직접 연결하는 버튼 추가.
5. 계약/스냅샷 유지 작업을 반영합니다.  
대상 파일: [content-contract.json](~/opensession/docs/content-contract.json), [landing-outline.json](~/opensession/docs/content-snapshots/landing-outline.json) (필요 시).  
기존 필수 섹션(`goal-map`, `operating-loop`)은 유지합니다.

### 테스트 케이스 및 시나리오
1. CLI 통합 테스트 확장: [handoff_cli.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/tests/handoff_cli.rs).  
시나리오:  
`setup` non-TTY + `--yes` 없음 -> 실패,  
`setup --yes` + fanout 미설정 + mode 미지정 -> 실패,  
`setup --yes --fanout-mode hidden_ref` -> 성공/훅+shim 설치 확인,  
`doctor --fix --yes --fanout-mode git_notes` -> 성공/설정값 확인.
2. CLI 단위 테스트 확장: [setup_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/setup_cmd.rs), [doctor_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/doctor_cmd.rs).  
시나리오: 확인 입력 파서(`y/N`), non-TTY 강제 규칙, fanout 명시 규칙.
3. 웹 E2E 테스트 확장: [landing.spec.ts](~/opensession/web/e2e/landing.spec.ts), [docs.spec.ts](~/opensession/web/e2e/docs.spec.ts).  
시나리오: 랜딩의 beginner CTA 노출, CTA 클릭 시 `/docs#getting-started` 이동, docs에 자동화 명령 노출.
4. 콘텐츠 계약 검증: [verify-content-contract.mjs](~/opensession/scripts/verify-content-contract.mjs).

### 검증 게이트 (실행 순서)
1. 변경된 CLI 테스트만 우선 실행.  
2. `cargo test -p opensession --quiet` 전체 통과.  
3. 웹 관련 변경 시 `wrangler dev` + Playwright 사용자 경로 검증.  
4. `./.githooks/pre-commit` 통과.  
5. `./.githooks/pre-push` 통과.

### 가정/기본값
1. `1.0.0` 이전 정책에 따라 자동화 호환성보다 명시적 동의를 우선합니다(의도적 동작 변경 허용).
2. 랜딩 카피는 기존 규칙대로 영어 유지(현재 E2E 계약 준수).
3. 데몬은 계속 선택 기능으로 유지하며 자동 시작은 추가하지 않습니다.
</proposed_plan>

   253	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   254	// Hook marker
   255	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   256	
   257	const HOOK_MARKER: &str = "# opensession-managed";
   258	
   259	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   260	// Hook template accessor
   261	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   262	
   263	/// Generate the hook script content for a given hook type.
   264	pub fn hook_template(hook_type: HookType) -> &'static str {
   265	    match hook_type {
   266	        HookType::PrePush => PRE_PUSH_HOOK,
   267	    }
   268	}
   269	
   270	fn ensure_git_repo(repo_root: &Path) -> Result<()> {
   271	    if repo_root.join(".git").exists() {
   272	        return Ok(());
   273	    }
   274	    bail!(
   275	        "Not a git repository: {} (missing .git metadata)",
   276	        repo_root.display()
   277	    );
   278	}
   279	
   280	fn configured_hooks_path(repo_root: &Path) -> Option<PathBuf> {
   281	    let output = Command::new("git")
   282	        .arg("-C")
   283	        .arg(repo_root)
   284	        .arg("config")
   285	        .arg("--local")
   286	        .arg("--get")
   287	        .arg("core.hooksPath")
   288	        .output()
   289	        .ok()?;
   290	    if !output.status.success() {
   291	        return None;
   292	    }
   293	    let raw = String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout).trim().to_string();
   294	    if raw.is_empty() {
   295	        return None;
   296	    }
   297	    let path = PathBuf::from(raw);
   298	    if path.is_absolute() {
   299	        Some(path)
   300	    } else {
   301	        Some(repo_root.join(path))
   302	    }
   303	}
   304	
   305	fn hooks_dir(repo_root: &Path) -> PathBuf {
   306	    configured_hooks_path(repo_root).unwrap_or_else(|| repo_root.join(".git").join("hooks"))
   307	}
   308	
   309	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   310	// Hook installer
   311	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   312	
   313	/// Install opensession git hooks into a repository.
   314	pub fn install_hooks(repo_root: &Path, hooks: &[HookType]) -> Result<Vec<HookType>> {
   315	    ensure_git_repo(repo_root)?;
   316	    let hooks_dir = hooks_dir(repo_root);
   317	    std::fs::create_dir_all(&hooks_dir)
   318	        .with_context(|| format!("create hooks directory {}", hooks_dir.display()))?;
   319	
   320	    let mut installed = Vec::new();
   321	    for hook_type in hooks {
   322	        let hook_path = hooks_dir.join(hook_type.filename());
   323	
   324	        // Check if there's an existing non-opensession hook
   325	        if hook_path.exists() {
   326	            let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&hook_path)
   327	                .with_context(|| format!("read existing hook {}", hook_path.display()))?;
   328	            if !content.contains(HOOK_MARKER) {
   329	                // Backup existing hook
   330	                let backup_path =
   331	                    hooks_dir.join(format!("{}.pre-opensession", hook_type.filename()));
   332	                std::fs::rename(&hook_path, &backup_path).with_context(|| {
   333	                    format!("backup existing hook to {}", backup_path.display())
   334	                })?;
   335	            }
   336	            // If it contains HOOK_MARKER, we'll just overwrite with new version
   337	        }
   338	
   339	        let template = hook_template(*hook_type);
   340	        std::fs::write(&hook_path, template)
   341	            .with_context(|| format!("write hook {}", hook_path.display()))?;
   342	
   343	        // Make executable on Unix
   344	        #[cfg(unix)]
   345	        {
   346	            use std::os::unix::fs::PermissionsExt;
   347	            let perms = std::fs::Permissions::from_mode(0o755);
   348	            std::fs::set_permissions(&hook_path, perms)
   349	                .with_context(|| format!("chmod hook {}", hook_path.display()))?;
   350	        }
   351	
   352	        installed.push(*hook_type);
   353	    }
   354	
   355	    Ok(installed)
   356	}
   357	
   358	/// Uninstall opensession git hooks from a repository.
   359	pub fn uninstall_hooks(repo_root: &Path, hooks: &[HookType]) -> Result<Vec<HookType>> {
   360	    if !repo_root.join(".git").exists() {
   361	        return Ok(Vec::new());
   362	    }
   363	    let hooks_dir = hooks_dir(repo_root);
   364	    let mut uninstalled = Vec::new();
   365	
   366	    for hook_type in hooks {
   367	        let hook_path = hooks_dir.join(hook_type.filename());
   368	        if !hook_path.exists() {
   369	            continue;
   370	        }
   371	
   372	        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(&hook_path).unwrap_or_default();
   373	        if !content.contains(HOOK_MARKER) {
   374	            continue; // Not our hook
   375	        }
   376	
   377	        std::fs::remove_file(&hook_path)?;
   378	
   379	        // Restore backup if exists
   380	        let backup_path = hooks_dir.join(format!("{}.pre-opensession", hook_type.filename()));
   381	        if backup_path.exists() {
   382	            std::fs::rename(&backup_path, &hook_path)?;
   383	        }
   384	
   385	        uninstalled.push(*hook_type);
   386	    }
   387	
   388	    Ok(uninstalled)
   389	}
   390	
   391	/// Check which opensession hooks are installed in a repository.
   392	pub fn list_installed_hooks(repo_root: &Path) -> Vec<HookType> {
   393	    if !repo_root.join(".git").exists() {
   394	        return Vec::new();
   395	    }
   396	    let hooks_dir = hooks_dir(repo_root);
   397	    let mut installed = Vec::new();
   398	
   399	    for hook_type in HookType::all() {
   400	        let hook_path = hooks_dir.join(hook_type.filename());
   401	        if hook_path.exists() {
   402	            if let Ok(content) = std::fs::read_to_string(&hook_path) {
   403	                if content.contains(HOOK_MARKER) {
   404	                    installed.push(*hook_type);
   405	                }
   406	            }
   407	        }
   408	    }
   409	
   410	    installed
   411	}

   413	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   414	// Secret detection
   415	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   416	
   417	/// A potential secret found in content.
   418	#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
   419	pub struct SecretMatch {
   420	    pub pattern_name: String,
   421	    pub line_number: usize,
   422	    pub context: String, // The line with the match (redacted)
   423	}
   424	
   425	/// Default secret patterns: (name, regex).
   426	pub fn default_secret_patterns() -> Vec<(&'static str, &'static str)> {
   427	    vec![
   428	        ("OpenAI API Key", r"sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}"),
   429	        ("GitHub PAT", r"ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}"),
   430	        ("GitHub OAuth Token", r"gho_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}"),
   431	        ("Private Key", r"-----BEGIN (RSA |EC )?PRIVATE KEY-----"),
   432	        ("Anthropic API Key", r"sk-ant-[a-zA-Z0-9\-]{20,}"),
   433	        ("AWS Secret", r"(?i)aws_secret_access_key\s*=\s*\S+"),
   434	        (
   435	            "Generic API Key Assignment",
   436	            r"(?i)(api[_-]?key|secret[_-]?key|auth[_-]?token)\s*=\s*['\x22][a-zA-Z0-9]{16,}['\x22]",
   437	        ),
   438	    ]
   439	}
   440	
   441	/// Scan content for potential secrets.
   442	pub fn scan_for_secrets(content: &str) -> Vec<SecretMatch> {
   443	    let patterns = default_secret_patterns();
   444	    let mut matches = Vec::new();
   445	
   446	    for (line_number, line) in content.lines().enumerate() {
   447	        for (name, pattern) in &patterns {
   448	            if let Ok(re) = regex::Regex::new(pattern) {
   449	                if re.is_match(line) {
   450	                    // Redact the matched portion
   451	                    let redacted = re.replace_all(line, "[REDACTED]").to_string();
   452	                    matches.push(SecretMatch {
   453	                        pattern_name: name.to_string(),
   454	                        line_number: line_number + 1,
   455	                        context: redacted,
   456	                    });
   457	                }
   458	            }
   459	        }
   460	    }

    41	## Install
    42	
    43	```bash
    44	cargo install opensession
    45	```
    46	
    47	`opensession` is the user-facing CLI. Session auto-capture additionally requires the daemon process to be running.
    48	
    49	## Install-and-Forget Setup
    50	
    51	```bash
    52	# 1) Diagnose local setup (flutter doctor style)
    53	opensession doctor
    54	
    55	# 2) Apply recommended setup values (hooks/shims/fanout defaults)
    56	opensession doctor --fix
    57	
    58	# 3) Optional: pin fanout storage mode while fixing
    59	opensession doctor --fix --fanout-mode hidden_ref
    60	```
    61	
    62	`doctor` reuses the existing setup pipeline under the hood (`opensession setup` / `opensession setup --check`).
    63	On first apply, OpenSession asks which fanout storage mode to use (`hidden_ref` or `git_notes`) and stores the choice in local git config (`.git/config`) as `opensession.fanout-mode`.
    64

    66	
    67	```bash

    69	opensession-daemon run
    70	
    71	# from source checkout
    72	cargo run -p opensession-daemon -- run
    73	```

    75	Without daemon, parse/register/share still work manually, but background auto-capture is not active.

    78	
    79	```bash
    80	# Parse agent-native log -> canonical HAIL JSONL
    81	opensession parse --profile codex ./raw-session.jsonl > ./session.hail.jsonl

    90	# Inspect summary metadata

    92	```
    93	
    94	## Share
    95	
    96	```bash
    97	# Convert local URI -> git shareable source URI
    98	opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin
    99	
   100	# Optional network mutation
   101	opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin --push
   102	
   103	# Install/update OpenSession pre-push hook (best-effort fanout)
   104	opensession doctor

   106	# Optional: fail push when fanout is unavailable/fails

   108
